---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new audit check or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like the tool to audit or do?**
Describe the check or capability.

**Why it's valuable**
The MSP/client value or the decision it supports.

**Data source (if known)**
Which Microsoft Graph endpoint / report it would use, and whether it needs a new
delegated scope. (See `docs/AUDIT_ROADMAP.md` — it may already be planned.)
